metadata.defaultDescription: Monitor brand mentions, analyze sentiment, and act on social insights. BraneIQ is the social listening platform for comms, PR, and marketing teams.
metadata.keywords: social listening, brand monitoring, sentiment analysis, media intelligence, reputation management, social media analytics, BraneIQ

home.title: Social Listening & Brand Intelligence Platform
home.description: Turn social noise into brand intelligence. Monitor mentions, track sentiment, and respond faster with BraneIQ — built for comms and marketing teams.

platform.title: Platform Overview
platform.description: Explore BraneIQ's unified social listening platform: real-time monitoring, sentiment analytics, smart alerts, and enterprise-grade multi-tenant workspaces.

demo.title: Request a Demo
demo.description: Schedule a personalized BraneIQ demo. See how comms and marketing teams monitor brands, analyze sentiment, and manage reputation at scale.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: BraneIQ privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our website and social listening platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: BraneIQ terms of service — the rules and conditions for using our website and social listening platform.

footer.tagline: Social listening and brand intelligence for modern comms and marketing teams.

hero.title: Turn social noise into brand intelligence
hero.subtitle: Monitor mentions, track sentiment, and act on insights across social channels — in one unified workspace built for comms and marketing teams.

preview.sample1: Brand mention spike on X — 340 posts/hr

trustedBy.title: Trusted by comms and marketing teams worldwide

solutions.title: One platform for listening, analysis, and action
solutions.subtitle: BraneIQ unifies monitoring, sentiment, and workflows in one platform — purpose-built for teams that need speed and clarity.

listen.name: BraneIQ Listen
listen.body: Social listening and brand intelligence on insights.braneiq.com — monitor mentions, track sentiment, and act on insights across channels.

moderator.name: BraneIQ Moderator
moderator.body: AI-powered comment moderation on moderator.braneiq.com — protect Facebook and Instagram ads and organic posts from spam and abuse.

listening.title: Social listening
listening.body: Track brands, keywords, and competitors across social channels with flexible queries and real-time feeds.

sentiment.title: Sentiment & analytics
sentiment.body: Understand tone, volume, and share of voice with dashboards designed for analysts and executives.

crisis.title: Crisis & reputation
crisis.body: Catch reputation risks early with smart alerts, escalation paths, and team workflows.

howItWorks.title: From setup to insight in days, not months
howItWorks.subtitle: A streamlined onboarding flow inspired by the best enterprise social suites.

connect.title: Connect sources
connect.body: Link social accounts and data sources. Configure brands, keywords, and competitor lists per workspace.

monitor.title: Monitor & enrich
monitor.body: BraneIQ ingests mentions, deduplicates noise, scores sentiment, and surfaces what matters in real time.

act.title: Act & report
act.body: Route alerts to the right people, collaborate on cases, and share reports with stakeholders.

features.title: Everything you need to listen and respond
features.subtitle: From keyword monitoring to executive-ready reports, BraneIQ helps teams stay ahead of the conversation.

monitoring.title: Real-time monitoring
monitoring.body: Track brand mentions, keywords, and competitors across social platforms with configurable queries and filters.

analytics.title: Sentiment & analytics
analytics.body: Understand tone, volume trends, and share of voice with dashboards designed for quick decisions.

alerts.title: Smart alerts
alerts.body: Get notified when conversations spike, sentiment shifts, or high-impact mentions need immediate attention.

teams.title: Built for teams
teams.body: Multi-client workspaces, role-based access, and workflows that scale from boutique agencies to enterprise.

industries.title: Built for teams across every sector
industries.subtitle: Whether you run an agency, a global brand, or a lean comms team — BraneIQ adapts to your workflow.

agencies.title: Agencies & consultancies
agencies.body: Manage multiple clients with isolated workspaces, white-label reports, and role-based team access.

enterprise.title: Enterprise comms & PR
enterprise.body: Monitor global brand health, track executive visibility, and coordinate crisis response across regions.

retail.title: Retail & consumer brands
retail.body: Track product launches, UGC, and competitor campaigns to protect reputation and drive engagement.
retail.statLabel: Faster issue detection vs. manual tracking

sports.title: Sports & entertainment
sports.body: Capture fan sentiment, sponsor visibility, and real-time buzz during events and match days.

testimonials.title: Teams that listen smarter
testimonials.subtitle: See how comms and marketing teams use BraneIQ to move faster and report with confidence.

one.quote: BraneIQ cut our daily monitoring routine from hours to minutes. Our clients get insights the same day, not the next week.
one.name: Sarah Chen

two.quote: During a product launch we caught a sentiment shift in under an hour. That early warning saved us from a much bigger crisis.
two.name: Marco Alvarez

three.quote: Multi-client workspaces were the deciding factor. We onboard new accounts in days without rebuilding our stack.

integrations.title: Connect the channels that matter
integrations.subtitle: Ingest mentions from social platforms and news sources — with more connectors shipping regularly.

security.title: Role-based access & audit logs
security.body: Control who sees what across workspaces with granular permissions and activity trails.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant isolation
multiTenant.body: Agency and enterprise clients stay fully separated — data, users, and configs per tenant.

realtime.title: Real-time pipeline
realtime.body: Built on a modern event-driven architecture for sub-minute ingestion and alert delivery.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about BraneIQ, our data sources, and how to get started.

what.a: BraneIQ is a social listening and brand intelligence platform. It helps comms, PR, and marketing teams monitor mentions, analyze sentiment, and respond to reputation risks across social channels.

sources.q: Which data sources do you support?
sources.a: BraneIQ currently supports X (Twitter), Reddit, Facebook, YouTube, and news/RSS feeds — with additional connectors on our roadmap. Contact us for specific source requirements.

teams.a: Yes. BraneIQ is built for agencies with multi-client workspaces, role-based access, and isolated data per tenant. Each client gets their own brands, keywords, and reports.

pricing.a: We offer flexible plans based on workspace size, data volume, and team seats. Request a demo and we'll recommend a plan tailored to your needs.

demo.a: Request a demo and our team will walk you through the platform, help configure your first brands and keywords, and discuss onboarding timelines.

cta.title: Ready to see BraneIQ in action?
cta.subtitle: Book a personalized demo and learn how teams use BraneIQ to protect and grow their brands.

platform.title: One platform for listening, analysis, and action
platform.subtitle: BraneIQ combines ingestion, enrichment, and reporting so your team can move from raw social data to confident decisions.

monitoring.title: Unified monitoring
monitoring.body: Collect posts, comments, and engagement signals from connected social sources into a single searchable timeline.

analytics.title: Insightful analytics
analytics.body: Measure sentiment, trending topics, and campaign impact with flexible views for analysts and executives.

security.title: Enterprise security
security.body: Role-based access, audit trails, and tenant isolation keep client data secure across agencies and brands.

automation.title: Workflow automation
automation.body: Route alerts, assign cases, and export reports so your team responds faster without manual busywork.

demo.title: Request a demo
demo.subtitle: Tell us about your team and we'll reach out to schedule a walkthrough of BraneIQ.
demo.success: Thanks — we've received your request and will be in touch shortly.

form.name: Full name
form.message: What would you like to monitor?

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: BraneIQ provides social listening and brand intelligence software. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit our website or use our services.

collection.title: Information we collect
collection.body: We collect information you provide directly (such as name, email, and company when requesting a demo), usage data from our platform, and publicly available social content processed on behalf of our customers under their instructions.

use.title: How we use information
use.body: We use information to provide and improve our services, respond to inquiries, secure our platform, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell personal information.

sharing.title: Sharing of information
sharing.body: We share information with service providers who assist in operating our platform, when required by law, or with your consent. Customer data is isolated per tenant.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: We retain information for as long as needed to provide services and meet legal requirements. Customers may request deletion subject to contractual and regulatory constraints.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal information. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: For privacy questions, contact privacy@braneiq.com or Cozmot Inc, the operator of BraneIQ.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the BraneIQ website, platform, and related services (collectively, the "Services") operated by Cozmot Inc ("BraneIQ," "we," "us," or "our"). By accessing or using the Services, you agree to these Terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: By visiting braneiq.com, creating an account, or using our platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the Services. If you use the Services on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

service.title: Description of service
service.body: BraneIQ provides social listening, brand monitoring, sentiment analysis, alerts, and related analytics tools for communications, marketing, and agency teams. Features, integrations, and availability may change over time. We may update, suspend, or discontinue parts of the Services with reasonable notice where practicable.

accounts.title: Accounts and security
accounts.body: You must provide accurate registration information and keep your credentials confidential. You are responsible for all activity under your account. Notify us promptly at hello@braneiq.com of any unauthorized access. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or pose a security risk.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: You agree not to misuse the Services. Prohibited conduct includes: violating applicable laws or third-party rights; scraping or accessing the Services through unauthorized automated means; attempting to probe, scan, or test vulnerabilities; interfering with platform operation; uploading malware; harvesting personal data without a lawful basis; or using the Services to monitor individuals in violation of platform terms or privacy laws. You are responsible for ensuring your use of social data complies with applicable platform policies and regulations.

subscription.title: Subscriptions and fees
subscription.body: Paid plans, billing cycles, and pricing are set out in your order form or subscription agreement. Fees are non-refundable except where required by law or expressly stated in writing. Failure to pay may result in suspension or termination of access. Trial or beta features may be offered as-is with no service-level commitments.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: BraneIQ and its licensors retain all rights in the Services, software, branding, documentation, and related materials. You receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable right to use the Services during your subscription term for internal business purposes. You may not copy, modify, reverse engineer, resell, or create derivative works except as permitted by law or written agreement.

data.title: Customer data
data.body: You retain ownership of data you submit to the Services. You grant BraneIQ a license to host, process, and display that data solely to provide and improve the Services. Public social content ingested through connectors is processed on your instructions. Our handling of personal information is described in our Privacy Policy. You are responsible for obtaining any consents or legal bases required for your monitoring activities.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
disclaimers.body: The Services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation, complete accuracy of sentiment or analytics outputs, or that the Services will meet your specific requirements. Social and third-party data sources are outside our control and may change without notice.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, BraneIQ and its affiliates will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, data, goodwill, or business opportunities. Our total liability arising from or related to the Services will not exceed the fees paid by you to BraneIQ in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim, or one hundred U.S. dollars if no fees were paid.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: You may stop using the Services at any time. We may suspend or terminate access for breach of these Terms, non-payment, legal requirements, or extended inactivity. Upon termination, your right to use the Services ends. Provisions that by nature should survive (including intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability, and governing law) will survive termination.

governingLaw.title: Governing law
governingLaw.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Disputes will be resolved in the state or federal courts located in Delaware, unless applicable law requires otherwise. If any provision is held unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in effect.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: Questions about these Terms may be sent to hello@braneiq.com. BraneIQ is operated by Cozmot Inc.
